title: Current pit-stop interaction block
summary: Use the current-lap pit-stop indicator as a state feature interacting with fresh tyres, stint, and race phase.
rationale: The current `PitStop` column is available at prediction time and carries strong state information. Interactions can distinguish rows where a stop just occurred from rows likely to stop next.
implementation_hint: Add interactions between current `PitStop` and `TyreLife`, `FreshTyre`, `Stint`, `RaceProgress`, `LapsRemaining_Est`, current compound, and current-tyre finish pressure. Avoid shifting `PitStop` forward or deriving next-lap pit labels.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Can become label-adjacent if incorrectly shifted; keep only current-row and prior-row uses.
